flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Friends University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($30.9k → $34.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Friends University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($30.9k → $34.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Friends University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Friends University rose 22% between 2021 and 2024 (29.3% → 35.8%).
